title: Infinite Lava
description:
Are you sick of having to constantly get lava from the nether? Well now you can create infinite lava sources in the same way that you can create infinite water sources.

This mod is compatible with Forge 1.16, 1.18, 1.19, and Fabric 1.18.
body: Are you sick of having to constantly get lava from the nether? Well now you can create infinite lava sources in the same way that you can create infinite water sources. This mod is compatible with Forge 1.16, 1.18, 1.19, and Fabric 1.18.
